title: IISAC | MBA IB DSE
description:
IISAC is a committee at MBA IB DSE that helps students get acquainted with port visits (dry and wet) and also hosts various events like Symposia, Freshers, Farewell, etc.
DSE MBA IB | University of Delhi | MIB | Since 1995
headings: INDUSTRY INTERACTION AND STUDENT ACTIVITIES COMMITTEE
To know more, connect with them
paragraphs: The Industry Interaction and Student Activities Committee (IISAC) (formerly Team CataClic) was constructed to fuel the exchange of ideas among students, academics, government and industry. The objective is co-creating an atmosphere of learning and experience, beyond the academic curriculum.

The IISAC regularly organizes sessions and events by inviting eminent personalities from the corporate-world and the education sector. It also organizes various industrial visits, educational tours and port visits to equip the students with a deep understanding of International and domestic business which form an integral part of the holistic learning provided at MIB.
The committee also organizes fresher and farewell and various student activities such as student orientation and ice breaking sessions to help the senior batch pass on the baton to the junior batch.

The sessions and activities, apart from being a great source of learning for the students will additionally bring the institute closer to specific companies. This helps in enhancing the visibility of the companies on the campus as well as the institute in the companies.
• Guest Lectures on contemporary and business issues
• Seminars and talks by functional managers and area experts
• Annual Symposium with a contemporary business theme
• Port visits (dry and wet port visits)
• Educational tours to industries across sectors

The Corporate Ecclesia is a virtual Panel Discussion organised by IISAC with the aim to get insights into the current happenings in the industry and thought processes of the corporates and policymakers.

Students of MBA (IB), Department of Commerce, Delhi school of Economics, Delhi University- (2019-2021) batch were taken to Noida- Special Economic Zone to learn and understand the EXIM business and its operations.

The Annual Wet Port visit to Jawaharlal Nehru Port Organized by the Industry Interaction and Student Activities Committee (IISAC), the students were in for a day of learning the intricacies of the import-export scenario in India.
The students of MBA(IB), batch of 2019-2021 visited to India’s largest Dry Port – ICD Tughlakabad on 29th of February,2020.

For any complaints against any constituent member of the MBA IB Student Body, Kindly reach out to PRESIDENT@MIBDU.ORG
